Intro

Imagine being a tree ;) Hey, I am Manogya and this is my minuscule space on internet. Don’t know How did you stumble upon here but since you are here have fun by knowing me.

I think this much information is apparently enough to know what I am currently using.
Hopefully, if you want to checkout my config.

                  -`                     manogya@Arch
                 .o+`                    ------------
                `ooo/                    OS: Arch Linux x86_64
               `+oooo:                   Host: Legion 5
              `+oooooo:                  Kernel: Linux 7.0.9-arch1-1
              -+oooooo+:                 Uptime: 1 day, 24 mins
            `/:-:++oooo+:                Packages: 1214 (pacman)
           `/++++/+++++++:               Shell: zsh 5.9
          `/++++++++++++++:              Display (BOE0A2D): 2560x1440 @ 1.56x in 16", 165 Hz
         `/+++ooooooooooooo/`            WM: dwm (X11)
        ./ooosssso++osssssso+`           Cursor: Adwaita
       .oossssso-````/ossssss+`          Terminal: alacritty 0.17.0
      -osssssso.      :ssssssso.         Memory: 3.49 GiB / 14.81 GiB (24%)
     :osssssss/        osssso+++.        CPU: AMD Ryzen 7 7735HS (16) @ 4.83 GHz
    /ossssssss/        +ssssooo/-        GPU 1: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4060 Max-Q / Mobile [Discrete]
  `/ossssso+/:-        -:/+osssso+-      Terminal Multiplexer: tmux 
 `+sso+:-`                 `.-/+oso:     Phone: android
